title: vittadinia blackii
intro: Vittadinia blackii, also known as Black's New Zealand daisy, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Vittadinia blackii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in infusions or applied topically as a poultice.
